question: How do I invite a team member?
How do I invite a team member?
answer: To invite a team member, go to Settings, then Team, and select Invite Member. Enter the email address of the person you want to invite and select their role from the available options: Admin, Editor, or Viewer.

question: How do I reset my password?
answer: To reset your password, click on the "Forgot Password" button on the login page and enter your registered email. A password reset link will be sent to you within 2 minutes.

question: What are the pricing plans?
answer: VortexIQ offers three pricing plans: Starter, Pro, and Enterprise. The Starter plan is free and supports up to 3 projects and 2 team members. The Pro plan costs $29 per month and supports unlimited projects. The Enterprise plan is custom-priced for organizations with 20 or more users.

question: How do I invite a team member?
answer: To invite a team member, go to Settings, then select Team, and finally click on Invite Member. Enter the email address of the person you want to invite and select their role (Admin, Editor, or Viewer).

question: How do I cancel my subscription?
answer: You can cancel your subscription at any time from the Billing settings page. Simply log in to your account, navigate to the Settings, then Billing, and select the option to cancel your subscription.

question: How do I connect Slack?
answer: To connect Slack, go to Settings, then Integrations, and select the Slack integration.

question: What roles can I assign to users?
answer: You can assign roles as Admin, Editor, or Viewer to users. These roles give different levels of access and abilities within the platform.

question: How do I generate an API key?
What happens after 5 failed login attempts?
answer: After 5 failed login attempts, your account will be locked for 15 minutes. If your account remains locked, you can contact support at support@vortexiq.com for assistance.

question: How do I export my data?
answer: To export your data, go to Settings then Data Export. Your exported data will be delivered as a ZIP file to your registered email.

question: How do I delete my account?
answer: To delete your account, go to Settings then Account, then select Delete Account. This action is permanent, and all data will be removed within 30 days. Please note that once your account is deleted, it cannot be restored.

question: What roles can I assign to users?
answer: You can assign the following roles to users: Admin, Editor, and Viewer. Admins have the most permissions, Editors can create, edit, and delete content, and Viewers have read-only access.

question: How do I generate an API key?
answer: To generate an API key, go to Settings, then Developer, and select API Keys from the menu. Your API key will be available for use with the VortexIQ API. Remember to keep it secret and never share or commit it to code.
